title: Handle link context entropy failure
description: Review during 2auf.35.4 found lichen_link_init ignores sys_csrand_get/getentropy results and may derive epoch from an indeterminate byte. Make initialization fail closed or use a documented deterministic fallback only where explicitly safe; add fault-injection coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Entropy failure cannot consume uninitialized data; callers receive a deterministic documented error/fallback; Zephyr and POSIX failure tests pass; three reviews pass.
close_reason: Fixed: lichen_link_init obtains entropy before any ctx mutation and returns -EIO on sys_csrand_get/getentropy failure (no indeterminate bytes); added Zephyr/POSIX fault tests; Rust lichen-link and C tests/clippy pass. See lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c:146
